title: foundation — queued jobs
description: One base infrastructure job. Extends `BaseJob` which auto-attaches Sentry tags + tenancy context + request_id from the dispatching request. Downstream modules use it directly (via the Searchable trait) — no per-module reimplementation. Import + export jobs previously listed here (ProcessImportBatchJob, GenerateExportJob) moved to `modules/transfer/` as of Wave 2 module inception — that module owns the full queue chain via `maatwebsite/excel`'s own `->queue()` mechanism and does not need foundation-level base jobs.

jobs.description: Pushes a model to its Scout search index. Called by the Searchable trait's `saved` event hook. Batches when possible — repeated saves on the same model within a 30-second window collapse to one job via ShouldBeUnique.

search.description: Search-index maintenance. Isolated because indexing spikes (bulk-updates) must not stall other work.
